briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines rather than actual artificial intelligence.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the collapse of fintech middleware firm Synapse, highlighting critical risks in the banking-as-a-service model.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is transforming traditional credit card products with novel features, rewards structures, and underwriting models that challenge conventional banking norms.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's deepening interest in financial data and alternative credit scoring.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A detailed analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping payments competition and what it means for consumers, banks, and fintechs globally.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Neo Financial becomes second FinTech to join Interac payment system](https://betakit.com/neo-financial-becomes-second-fintech-to-join-interac-payment-system/)** — *BetaKit* — Calgary-based Neo Financial has become only the second fintech company to gain direct membership in Canada's Interac payment network, marking a significant milestone for fintech access to core Canadian payments infrastructure.

- **[How the war in the Middle East is already impacting mortgage rates in Canada](https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/iran-war-mortgage-rates-canada-9.7152182?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Rising geopolitical tensions linked to the Iran conflict are pushing Canadian mortgage rates higher and shrinking the availability of affordable deals for homebuyers.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — *(Relevant context for Canadian open banking)* Canada signalled its intention to move away from screen scraping toward a formal open banking framework, a regulatory journey that continues to shape the Canadian fintech landscape today.

- **[The energy crisis is getting worse. How protected is Canada?](https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/calgary/how-protected-is-canada-energy-crisis-9.7151847?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — As global energy prices surge amid ongoing conflict, analysts examine Canada's exposure and resilience against the worsening energy crisis and its downstream effects on the economy.

- **[Amazon adding fuel surcharge for Canadian, U.S. sellers starting April 17](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/amazon-fuel-surcharge-canada-april-17-9.7151984?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Amazon will introduce a new fuel surcharge for Canadian and American marketplace sellers beginning April 17, adding cost pressure to small businesses already navigating a volatile economic environment.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Neo Financial becomes second FinTech to join Interac payment system](https://betakit.com/neo-financial-becomes-second-fintech-to-join-interac-payment-system/)** — *BetaKit* — This landmark development in Canadian payments infrastructure is directly relevant to Atlantic Fintech's focus on payments innovation and the ongoing question of how Canadian fintechs — including those in Atlantic Canada — can gain meaningful access to core national payment rails like Interac.

- **[SAGA Metals Engages Dias Airborne for Advanced Geophysical Survey at Radar Critical Minerals Project in Labrador](https://financialpost.com/globe-newswire/saga-metals-engages-dias-airborne-for-advanced-geophysical-survey-over-entire-oxide-layering-strike-connecting-trapper-and-hawkeye-zones-at-radar-critical-minerals-project-in-labrador)** — *Financial Post* — While not fintech-specific, this Atlantic Canadian investment activity in Labrador's critical minerals sector signals ongoing capital flows into the region, highlighting opportunities for fintech and embedded finance solutions serving the resource and junior mining ecosystem in Atlantic Canada.
